description: Check faucet claim status and cooldown for an address

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to check. If not provided, defaults to current authenticated user's address.

prerequisites: If --address not provided, must be authenticated (use xion-oauth2 skill)
Faucet is only available on testnet
notes: Returns last claim timestamp and remaining cooldown
can_claim is true if cooldown has expired (remaining_cooldown_secs == 0)
last_claim_timestamp is 0 if the address has never claimed
AI AGENT NOTE: Use this command BEFORE claiming to verify the user can claim (cooldown expired and balance gate satisfied)
AI AGENT NOTE: If remaining_cooldown_secs > 0, inform user of wait time before they can claim again
AI AGENT NOTE: This query does NOT require authentication when --address is provided

errors.remediation: Check network connectivity and verify the faucet contract is available
Provide --address flag or authenticate with 'xion-toolkit auth login'

errors.description: Faucet not available on this network
errors.remediation: Use '--network testnet' or 'xion-toolkit config set-network testnet'

examples.description: Check status for a specific address
